result: The data cleaning task has been completed successfully. The R script loaded all 9 wave files from data/input/, merged them using full_join by NSID, harmonized missing codes to standard codes (-9=Refusal, -8=Don't know, -1=Not applicable, -3=Not asked), and created a time-invariant sex variable that prioritizes the most recent valid response (age 32) falling back to earlier waves. The output file data/output/cleaned_data.csv contains 16,111 cohort members with NSID and the consolidated sex variable (Male/Female with proper factor labels).
